name: Satori Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Satori Electric Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, distributes electronic components and equipment in Japan, China, Taiwan, and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Device Solution and System Solution. It offers discrete semiconductors, electrical parts and materials, control components, and factory automation and systems; and IoT and embedded solutions, as well as contract services. The company is also involved in the development and production of information control systems and switching devices, as well as in the design, development, and testing of customized integrated circuits and microprocessors; and promotion and information gathering activities. In addition, it designs, develops, manufactures, and sells switch products for electric tools. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
